calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Clean seed-7 vs seed-42 readout/rank diagnostic for monostrategy collapse
items.note: Diagnostic only; claim_ids=[] in manifest. Fixed env_seed=42, agent_seed=7 vs 42. Reuses V3-EXQ-555 P0/P1 depth and instruments P1 fresh E3 proposal ticks for candidate/readout diversity, score margins, argmin action-class entropy, selected action-class entropy, and executed action-class entropy. No monkey-patching and no ree_core edits.
